title: Genesis AI introduces GENE-26.5 model for more dexterous robot manipulation
title_zh: Genesis AI introduces GENE-26.5 model for more dexterous robot manipulation
abstract:
Genesis AI says its GENE-26.5 foundation model uses an advanced data engine and a proprietary robotic hand for new levels of dexterity. 
 The post  Genesis AI introduces GENE-26.5 model for more dexterous robot manipulation  appeared first on  The Robot Report .
abstract_zh: Genesis AI says its GENE-26.5 foundation model uses an advanced data engine and a proprietary robotic hand for new levels of dexterity. The post Genesis AI introduces GENE-26.5 model for more dexterous robot manipulation appeared first on The Robot Report .
